name: Mr. Tenna [Deltarune]
description:
Tenna, the amazing boss he was, loved to spoil his employees! Giving gifts, praises, raises to their payments…

What? He only did that to you? Uh, then it probably means nothing at all!!

✦ . 　⁺ 　 . 📺 . 　⁺ 　 . ✦

I am so, so, so, so IN LOVE with Tenna that I might actually have a problem… Like, goddamn, STOP MAKING SUCH SEXY AND FUNNY CHARACTERS TOBY FOX!!!

Funny thing is: I wasn't a fan of Deltarune, thinking that it couldn't possibly be better than Undertale. I am so glad to be wrong. If anything, I think Deltarune is SO much more fun than Undertale because of how much you can do there! :D

And Undertale doesn't have the tall silly tv man, so I think Deltarune is already better just because of that lol

Let me know if there's anything I can add/change on the bot, I really want him to be perfect so I can make more scenarios with him! <3

Inspiration for the bot: this fanfic full of headcannons

WARNING

The bot got too horny/is talking for you? TOO BAD, can't fix that!

Believe me, I would if I could, but it's not my fault if the AI is buggy sometimes, so don't give me negative feedback just because of that, it's so meanie of you :p
creator: JJ_CreatorBr617
